channel.title: npj Comput. Mater.
channel.description: Filtered papers from npj Comput. Mater.

item.title: Machine Learning Pipeline for Denoising Low Signal-To-Noise Ratio and Out-Of-Distribution Transmission Electron Microscopy Datasets
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 27 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02193-9

Machine learning pipeline for denoising low signal-to-noise ratio and out-of-distribution transmission electron microscopy datasets

item.title: Refining Machine Learning Potentials Through Thermodynamic Theory of Phase Transitions
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 22 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02195-7

Refining machine learning potentials through thermodynamic theory of phase transitions

item.title: Addressing Hypersensitivity in Density Functional Theory for Reliable Machine Learning
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 19 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02191-x

Addressing hypersensitivity in density functional theory for reliable machine learning

item.title: Framework for Digital Synthesis of Battery Electrode Microstructure Using Inverse Generative Machine Learning Algorithm
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 18 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02125-7

Framework for digital synthesis of battery electrode microstructure using inverse generative machine learning algorithm

item.title: Leveraging Neural Network Interatomic Potentials for a Foundation Model of Chemistry
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02167-x

Leveraging neural network interatomic potentials for a foundation model of chemistry

item.title: Coercivity Influence of Nanostructure in SmCo-1:7 Magnets: Machine Learning of High-Throughput Micromagnetic Data
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 11 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02174-y

Coercivity influence of nanostructure in SmCo-1:7 magnets: machine learning of high-throughput micromagnetic data

item.title: OpenCSP: A Deep Learning Framework for Crystal Structure Prediction from Ambient to High Pressure
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02180-0

OpenCSP: a deep learning framework for crystal structure prediction from ambient to high pressure

item.title: Highly Efficient Machine Learning Strategy for Low-Loss Eels Characterization: Nanophotonic Resonances as a Case Study
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 09 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02171-1

Highly efficient machine learning strategy for low-loss eels characterization: nanophotonic resonances as a case study

item.title: AFM-Net: Machine Learning Acceleration of Atomic Force Microscopy Nanometrology from Scarce Data and Fast Scans
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 08 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02179-7

AFM-net: machine learning acceleration of atomic force microscopy nanometrology from scarce data and fast scans

item.title: TrussGPT: Large Language Model-Driven Inverse Design Framework for Truss Metamaterials
item.description:
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 04 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02175-x

TrussGPT: large language model-driven inverse design framework for truss metamaterials
